testcase.name: test_cancel_received_po_returns_400
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_audit_money_stock_fixes.py:103: in test_cancel_received_po_returns_400 assert resp.status_code == 400, f"Expected 400 but got {resp.status_code}: {resp.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 400 but got 401: {"detail":"Invalid token"} E assert 401 == 400 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_reopen_cash_po_includes_payment_reversal_message

error.message: failed on teardown with "RuntimeError: Event loop is closed"

testcase.error: backend/tests/test_audit_money_stock_fixes.py:185: in setup_and_teardown run_async(cleanup()) backend/tests/test_audit_money_stock_fixes.py:88: in run_async return loop.run_until_complete(coro) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/asyncio/base_events.py:654: in run_until_complete return future.result() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ backend/tests/test_audit_money_stock_fixes.py:183: in cleanup await db_conn.purchase_orders.delete_many({"id": {"$in": [cash_po_id, terms_po_id]}}) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/motor/metaprogramming.py:74: in method return framework.run_on_executor( /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/motor/frameworks/asyncio/__init__.py:85: in run_on_executor return loop.run_in_executor(_EXECUTOR, functools.partial(fn, *args, **kwargs)) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/asyncio/base_events.py:817: in run_in_executor self._check_closed() /usr/local/lib/python3.11/asyncio/base_events.py:520: in _check_closed raise RuntimeError('Event loop is closed') E RuntimeError: Event loop is closed
